CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET
PAGE 02
1
Karan wanted a finance career without borders.
I want to work globally.
2
But a plain degree felt too local for his dream.
How do I go global?
3
Then he found a B.Com integrated with ACCA, UK.
Global, and affordable!
4
He enrolled and began building a global edge.
From local to global!

Why A B.Com With ACCA, UK

  • 1
    Master global finance, IFRS and international accounting on an ACCA-aligned syllabus.
  • 2
    Earn a globally recognised edge, accredited by ACCA, UK, alongside your degree.
  • 3
    All at the same affordable fee: ₹1,35,000 for the full 3-year B.Com (₹45,000/year), with 0% interest EMI.
  • 4
    A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ B.Com, with the added global weight of ACCA.

Powered byGoogleMicrosoftIndustry Experts
